# CleanJobData

> Jobs posting API for developers and companies building job boards. Fresh, structured job listings via REST — no scraping. This site is a live demo built on the CleanJobData API.

CleanJobData provides clean, structured job data through a simple REST API. Use it to launch a job board, power talent tooling, or analyze the labor market. This site is a working reference implementation.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Live job board demo and product overview.

## Optional

- [API docs](https://cleanjobdata.com/docs): CleanJobData REST API reference.
- [CleanJobData](https://cleanjobdata.com): Marketing site and pricing.
